meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve can't finish projects (Advanced Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't finish projects. A Advanced-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Master User Onboarding: Finish Your AI Projects Faster
content.seo_description: Stop abandoning projects. Learn advanced user onboarding techniques using Antigravity and Claude Code to build professional-grade AI applications today.
content.answer_block: The root cause of unfinished projects is a lack of immediate user value. By implementing high-fidelity onboarding, you guide users to their 'Aha!' moment instantly. Use Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative implementation to bridge the gap between prototype and a production-ready, finished application.
content.intro:
You sit before a blank terminal, the weight of a dozen half-finished repositories hanging over your progress. Every project starts with a surge of adrenaline, but inevitably hits the wall of complexity and scope creep. You aren't failing because you lack skill; you are failing because you lack a framework that forces your application to deliver value on day one.

User onboarding is the missing link in your development lifecycle. It isn't just about tooltips or welcome screens—it is the engineering discipline of forcing your code to solve a specific problem for a specific person immediately. When you prioritize the user's journey, you find the focus required to cross the finish line.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the exact action that proves your app delivers value. Without this, your onboarding is just noise.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project codebase and extract the core value proposition. Propose a 3-step 'Aha!' sequence that guides a user to the primary feature within 60 seconds.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Analyze current codebase and document the critical path for user onboarding'

steps.title: Architect the Onboarding State Machine
steps.description: Use a state machine to manage user progress, ensuring they cannot skip critical setup steps.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust state machine schema for user onboarding in TypeScript. Include states for 'unauthenticated', 'profile-setup', 'feature-tour', and 'active'.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --file src/lib/onboarding-machine.ts --content 'Implement state machine logic based on the schema'

steps.title: Implement Progressive Disclosure
steps.description: Hide complex settings until the user has completed the basic onboarding flow to reduce cognitive load.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor my settings component to use progressive disclosure. Ensure advanced configurations are lazy-loaded behind the initial onboarding completion flag.

steps.title: Automate User Data Seeding
steps.description: Populate empty states with realistic data so the user isn't looking at a blank dashboard.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a seeding script that generates high-quality mock data for the dashboard when a new user finishes onboarding.

steps.title: Add Contextual Feedback Loops
steps.description: Use toast notifications and progress bars to acknowledge user success during the onboarding process.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a reusable FeedbackToast component that tracks onboarding progress and provides positive reinforcement upon completion of steps.

pro_tips: Never build a generic welcome tour; build a 'first-task' tour that forces the user to interact with your API.
Use persistent storage for onboarding state so users can resume exactly where they left off if they refresh.
Implement an 'onboarding-skip' analytic to see where users feel the friction is too high.
Treat your onboarding flow as a separate micro-service in your architecture to keep your main application code clean.
Use AI-generated synthetic users to stress-test your onboarding flow for edge cases before going live.
content.next_steps: Deploy your onboarding flow to a staging environment, invite three peers to test it, and track exactly where they drop off to optimize your conversion rates.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools and the architecture; now you just need the discipline to execute. Stop letting your projects die in the draft folder. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
